ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT(ISPICKVAL(Type, 'Feature Update')), RecordTypeId <> '012b0000000cfCa', ISCHANGED(Probability), Probability >= 0.5, OR( ISBLANK(Economic_Buyer__c), ISBLANK(Economic_Buyer_Title__c) ), RecordType.DeveloperName <> "Rank_Ranger", RecordType.DeveloperName <> "Acquired_Company", RecordTypeId <> '012b0000000cfCa', /*Panel Acquisition*/ RecordType.DeveloperName <> "Partnership", $Profile.Name <> 'SW SalesOps Extended', MEDPIC_Next_Stage__c = false )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please Insert the name of the economic buyer with a title
